examples: Combine the oil, salt and tarragon; drizzle over vegetables and toss to coat.
Roughly chop greens along with leaves of a half bunch parsley and a bunch tarragon .
Add the sweet potatoes, water or stock, tarragon sprigs and orange zest, and bring to a simmer.
Tarragon is very temperature sensitive and cold temperatures slow growth and quite commonly causes leaf quality issues.
The dressing, made with mayonnaise and sour cream, gets its pretty pale-green hue and heady fragrance from fresh tarragon, parsley and lots of basil.
